content.en:
"Slash!"

Ye Tian cast the Void Blade and slashed it directly.

No matter how powerful his strength was, even if it was a Void Blade that only contained seventy-two extreme extreme paths, its power was terrifying to the extreme.

Ice Feather Ancestor tried to block Ye Tian's Void Blade with a defensive primordial control technique, but then the defense was directly penetrated.

Tear and pull!

Ice Feather Ancestor's body was torn apart, and although it did not fall, it was only seriously injured, but it made him directly dumbfounded.

"Glass Sacred Cover !!"

Ice Feather Ancestor was shocked, Ye Tian had actually practiced this holy art, and his defense was invincible, how could he fight through it!

If Ye Tian was just strong in defense, but Ye Tian's attack power was so terrifying that it surpassed his own defense.

Thundered!!!!

After fighting again and again, Ice Feather Ancestor's body was pierced by Ye Tian again and again, and his injuries became more and more serious.

In the end, Ice Feather Ancestor chose to admit defeat.

"I throw in the towel!"

Ice Feather Ancestor said helplessly.

He didn't want to let this clone of his will fall, otherwise it would take a long time and a huge price to recover slowly, and it wouldn't be worth it.

As the Ice Feather Ancestor admitted defeat, it represented that Ye Tian had become a holy son of the main lineage.

And the Ice Feather Ancestor could only go to other lineages to become the Holy Son, or be reduced to the true disciple of the main lineage, there were only these two choices.

In the end, the Ice Feather Ancestor chose to become the Holy Son of the other veins.

......

After becoming the Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, Ye Tian quickly enjoyed the treatment of the Holy Son.

"The Holy Son can actually master ten treasure lands, and he can also have a fourfold ancestor as a servant!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

These two treatments are too good, of course, they also reflect how high the status of the Holy Son of the Fivefold Holy Gate is, and the elders of the Fourfold Heavenly Gate are far from being comparable!

Moreover, the strength of the Fivefold Holy Gate is also too strong, and the resources it has are far from being comparable to other forces.

In addition to these two treatments, Ye Tian can also have a lot of resources, many inheritances, and the benefits of listening to the sermons of the Fivefold Ancestor and so on.

Moreover, Ye Tian could also enjoy the many cultivation holy places of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, such as many places suitable for contemplating the Extreme Path of Enlightenment, and the effect of contemplation far surpassed those cultivation treasures of the Quadruple Heavenly Gate.

This is also the reason why the Holy Sons can comprehend many extreme extreme paths, but it is difficult for the Quadruple Heavenly Gate to cultivate a triple ancestor who has comprehended the seventy-two extreme extreme paths.

"Extreme Mountain!"

This is one of the foundations of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and it is rumored to be one of the treasures that many of the Void Tooth Holy Gate's Fivefold Ancestors fought with many Fivefold Ancestors in the Primordial Black Sea and finally snatched back.

It is said that for the sake of this extreme mountain, the Void Tooth Holy Gate also fell three fivefold ancestors.

The function of the Extreme Mountain is to assist in the comprehension of the Extreme Path, and the efficiency is at least dozens of times or more than that of the outside world.

Only the True Transmission Disciples and the Holy Son can enter the Extreme Mountain, and the True Transmission disciples have to pay a huge contribution value to enter the Extreme Mountain, but the Holy Son does not need contribution points to have been practicing in the Extreme Mountain.

This is also one of the treatments of the Holy Son.

Of course, as the Holy Son of the Main Vein, Ye Tian can also obtain some extremely rare resources, such as resources for cultivating holy arts, which he can exchange, while the Holy Son of the ordinary vein does not have this treatment.

this day.

A Quadruple Ancestor came to Ye Tian's side.

This is a female ancestor, named Xuanyu Yuanzu.

"I've seen the master!"

Xuanyu Ancestor said respectfully.

"Tell me where you came from!" Ye Tian said.

Although it was arranged by the Void Tooth Holy Gate, he also had to know the identity and origin of this servant, and he couldn't let her do things for him without knowing anything!

"Yes, master!"

Xuanyu Ancestor quickly explained his origin.

It turned out that the Xuanyu Origin Ancestor came from a Quadruple Heavenly Gate under the command of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and her talent was also very good, but after cultivating to endless years, she was lucky enough to be promoted to the Quadruple Ancestor, and it was difficult for her to continue to improve.

Today, she lacks resources, and she is still in the early stage of the Quadruple Ancestor.

She also wanted to grow up, so she chose to enter the Void Fang Holy Gate as a servant.

In this way, following a Holy Son, in case the Holy Son grows to the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, she will also be able to follow the light, and hopefully reach the peak of the Fourfold Primordial Ancestor or even the realm of the half-step Fivefold Primordial Ancestor.

Of course, it is also more dangerous to become a servant of the Holy Son, and if there is something dangerous for her to do, or even let her do it herself, then she may fall.

The Holy Sons of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, some of them even changed several servants.

Therefore, becoming a servant of the Son is both an opportunity and a crisis.

"From now on, you can follow me to deal with some things!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

But in fact, he didn't have anything to do with Xuanyu Ancestor, so he went directly to the Extreme Mountain, where he planned to retreat and cultivate, and comprehend all the three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths.

When the time comes, he will be able to condense the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths onto the Will Pagoda, and his strength will reach the true limit of the Triple Ancestor.

......

Extreme Mountain.

Ye Tian came here as a holy son, and directly sensed the dense Extreme Extreme Dao aura, which filled the entire Extreme Mountain.

"Here, all kinds of extreme extremes have been embodied!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

It's no wonder that this place can help people quickly comprehend the extreme path.

However, the number of extreme extremes comprehended by each ancestor is limited, and in the future, for each extreme extreme path comprehended, the time and cost paid have to be superimposed, and you can imagine how difficult it is to reach more than a hundred.

As for comprehending three hundred and sixty-five kinds, it is almost impossible.

That is, Ye Tian, who has a large number of Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments, can easily comprehend all kinds of extreme Extreme Dao.

"Let's take our time!"

Ye Tian found a suitable place, sat cross-legged, and began to comprehend and cultivate a variety of extreme extreme paths.

"Extreme Mountain, combined with the resource comprehension, coupled with my own Extreme Extreme Dao, this speed is simply flying!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

At this rate, he estimated that it would only take five Primordial Realm Epochs to comprehend an Extreme Extreme Dao.

Years have passed, and hundreds of primordial eras have passed.

For those Holy Sons, retreating for hundreds of Primordial Epochs at a time is nothing, and there may be no progress.

However, no one knew how terrifying Ye Tian's progress was!

At this moment, he was about to comprehend the three hundred and sixty-four extreme extreme paths.

Rumble!!!!!

The three hundred and sixty-four Extreme Extreme Dao was comprehended by Ye Tian.

And at this time, Ye Tian's Endless Extreme Dao had finally been raised to the Extreme Extreme Dao level.

At this point, the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes have been completely gathered.

Then, he took a little more time to engrave all the three hundred and sixty-five layers of the Pagoda of Will with the three hundred and sixty-five black characters of the original Zhou Tian Tu.

That is, at the moment when all the three hundred and sixty-five black characters were inscribed, all these black characters allowed the Will Pagoda to feedback the corresponding extreme power, and integrated into the body, forming a certain transformation.

He is about to condense the body of the primordial Zhou Tian!
